title: odontarrhena elatior
intro: Odontarrhena elatior, also known as Lomatium elatior, is a type of flowering plant native to North America. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant contains compounds that exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing the severity and duration of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Odontarrhena elatior are often used in the form of capsules, tinctures, or teas, and are commonly taken to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
